scripts.db:seed-master-data: npx dotenvx run -f packages/db/.env.encrypt -- yarn workspace @packages/db tsx seeds/seed-industry-categories-and-industries.ts && npx dotenvx run -f packages/db/.env.encrypt -- yarn workspace @packages/db tsx seeds/seed-listing-types.ts && npx dotenvx run -f packages/db/.env.encrypt -- yarn workspace @packages/db tsx seeds/seed-position-levels.ts
scripts.db:seed-sample-tenants: npx dotenvx run -f packages/db/.env.encrypt -- yarn workspace @packages/db tsx seeds/seed-sample-tenants.ts
scripts.client:dev:dotenvx: npx dotenvx run -f apps/client/.env.encrypt -- yarn workspace @apps/client dev
